barRaise.topFinding: Fifteenth review, run one day after the fourteenth with zero new commits in between. The last release is still 0.51.2 (committed 2026-06-08, before the 06-09 review ran), so nothing material has changed: the working tree carries only a one-line CONTEXT.md tail completion. Every finding from 06-09 carries forward verbatim. No HIGHs. Six MEDIUMs, all ordinary pre-1.0 debt with verified line numbers: the unminified release bundle (release.ps1:90), the twelve-layer styles-v2..v13 cascade, the TypeScript-major straddle, the unmeasured basket-coordinate launch gate, the missing Decision 30 home, and the post-1.0 worker/src/index.js monolith. One positive confirmation: the 0.51.0 writer fix held, so the barRaise block the 06-09 run wrote into YaC.json survived as predicted. The only genuinely new signal is process rather than code: a daily bar-raise on a project that ships in bursts now reproduces yesterday's report. Verdict holds at needs-attention; the route to healthy is the same four quick MEDIUMs, untouched only because no release has landed since.
